race.comment: SHADOWFAX (10) has good early speed but perhaps may look to take a sit behind the anticipated pace battle. Is ticking along nicely and only needs to hold his form to be involved in the finish. IN LOVE (6) is one of the likely leaders and will have to push forward from her wide gate. Gets in well again with the 3kg claim and will take some catching if given it softly. SHARENDIPITY (5) will appreciate the anticipated tempo, though she will likely get a fair way back from the draw. Was good late when resuming and with any improvement she can cause a scare. SHADOW EAGLE (1) is another that will be licking his lips at the anticipated speed. Drops back to the 1000m off a month and is a chance to explode late. EFFUSIV (8) is another one of the likely leaders who will give a bold sight from the good draw. Have to include.
